query: SELECT debt_range, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM debt_collected_cache GROUP BY debt_range ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT debt_range, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM debt_collected_cache GROUP BY debt_range ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
